engineering_standards: Accuracy over Speed: In Trust & Safety, a false positive is better than a missed violation, but exactness is paramount.
Explainability over Black Box: All detections must be traceable to a specific word or pattern. No opaque LLM verdicts.
Privacy First: Audio is never persisted. Delete temp files in finally blocks.
Indian Languages First: Native handling of Hinglish, transliteration, and code-switching.
Everything In-House: No vendor lock-in. Whisper and Pyannote run locally.
Deterministic Detection before LLM: Use LLM only for reasoning/contextualizing, never for detection.
coding_rules: Type Hints: All Python functions must have complete type hints.
Error Handling: Catch specific exceptions, never bare `except:`.
Dependency Injection: Pass dependencies explicitly where possible.
File Deletion: Ensure local files are removed in `finally` blocks.
API Responses: Always return structured JSON with predictable schemas.
architecture_notes: 6-Layer Pipeline: Audio -> Speech -> Language -> Compliance -> Reasoning -> Business.
Separation of Concerns: Compliance layer DETECTS violations. Reasoning layer (LLM) EXPLAINS violations.
Async Execution: `BackgroundTasks` are used for processing to unblock the API.
State Management: In-memory job store (temporary) tracking queued/processing/completed/failed states.
model_information: Whisper: `large-v3` running on CPU with `int8` quantization (faster-whisper).
Pyannote: Speaker diarization model (requires HF_TOKEN). Identifies SPEAKER_00 vs SPEAKER_01.
Gemini: `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` via Vertex AI (ADC authentication). Used for reasoning and synthesis, NOT detection.
infrastructure_notes: Storage: None currently (in-memory job dict). Redis/Postgres planned for Phase 2.
deployment_notes: Local Execution: Run `uvicorn app.main:app --reload` on port 8001.
Frontend Execution: Run `npm run dev` on port 5173.
CORS: Currently set to allow all origins. Must be restricted before production.
GCP Credentials: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS must point to a valid service account JSON.
